expiredPassword.title: CardSync - Password expired
expiredPassword.subtitle: To continue, create a new password for your account.
expiredPassword.neutralError: Could not change the password. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue

forgot.label: I forgot my password
forgot.disabled: I forgot my password (unavailable when the password is expired)

login.lockedBody: Your account has been temporarily locked. Please try again later.
login.expiredBody: Your password has expired. Update it to continue.
login.locked: User is locked. Please try again shortly.
login.expiredPassword: Your password has expired. You need to change it.

passwordExpiredModal.title: Password expired
passwordExpiredModal.message: Your password has expired. Click OK to update it.

passwordExpiringModal.title: Your password will expire soon
passwordExpiringModal.message: Your password will expire in {days} day(s). Click OK to continue.

policy.invalid: Password does not meet the policy.

reuse.notAllowed: Password cannot repeat the most recent passwords.

rule.common: Do not use a common password
rule.history: Do not reuse the last {0} passwords
rule.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current password
rule.hint: The password must satisfy all the rules above.

forget.title: CardSync - Forgot password
forget.subtitle: Enter your username. If it exists, we will send an email with instructions.
forget.sent: If the username exists, an email has been sent with instructions.

common.somethingWentWrong: Something did not go as expected.

resetExpired.subtitle: Your password reset link is no longer valid.
resetExpired.alertBody: Request a new link to reset your password.

change.subtitle: Update your password according to the policy
change.error: Could not change the password. Check your current password and try again.

set.subtitle: Create your password to complete first access
set.welcomeBody: Set a password to complete your first access.
set.hint: Ask support to resend the invitation.

reset.subtitle: Set a new password to continue
reset.almostThereBody: Create a new password following the policy.
reset.hint: Request a new reset using the link above.

inviteExpired.subtitle: Your first-access invitation is no longer valid.
inviteExpired.alertBody: Request a new link to set your password.

layout.heroSubtitle: Your CardSync access with more security, clarity, and confidence.
layout.copyLinkHint: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
layout.footerLeft: Secure platform for financial reconciliation, access management, and operations with more control.
layout.doNotReply: Please do not reply to this message.

reset.title: Password reset
reset.subject: CardSync - Password reset
reset.bodyLine1: We received a request to reset the password for your CardSync account.
reset.bodyLine2: To continue securely, click the button below and choose a new password.
reset.footerNote: If you did not request this reset, ignore this email and your account will remain protected.

firstPassword.title: Set your password
firstPassword.subject: CardSync - Set your password
firstPassword.bodyLine1: Your CardSync access has been created successfully.
firstPassword.bodyLine2: To complete your registration and activate your account, click the button below to set your first password.
firstPassword.footerNote: If you did not request this access, ignore this email.

error.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.USER_DOCUMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS: A user with this document already exists.
error.USER_USERNAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A user with this username already exists.
error.USER_DELETE_SELF_NOT_ALLOWED: You cannot delete your own user.
error.USER_DELETE_PROTECTED_NOT_ALLOWED: This user is protected and cannot be deleted.
error.INVITE_RESEND_USER_INACTIVE: Cannot resend invitation to an inactive user.
error.INVITE_RESEND_USER_ALREADY_ACTIVE: Invitation can only be resent for a user pending password setup.
error.PASSWORD_POLICY_INVALID: The new password does not meet the required policy.
error.USER_ACTIVATE_INVALID_STATUS: The user cannot be activated from the current status
error.USER_DEACTIVATE_SELF_NOT_ALLOWED: You cannot deactivate your own user
error.USER_DEACTIVATE_INVALID_STATUS: The user cannot be deactivated from the current status
error.USER_BULK_IDS_REQUIRED: Please provide at least one user id
error.USER_UPDATE_SUPPORT_NOT_ALLOWED: Users in the SUPPORT group cannot be edited.
error.USER_ACTIVATE_SUPPORT_NOT_ALLOWED: Users in the SUPPORT group cannot be activated.
error.USER_DEACTIVATE_SUPPORT_NOT_ALLOWED: Users in the SUPPORT group cannot be deactivated.

403.title: 403 — Access denied.
403.subtitle: You do not have permission to access this page.

404.title: 404 — Page not found.
404.subtitle: The page you tried to access does not exist or has been moved.

error.GROUP_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A group with this name already exists.
error.GROUP_DELETE_SUPPORT_NOT_ALLOWED: The SUPPORT group cannot be deleted or changed in this operation.
error.GROUP_DELETE_IN_USE: This group has associated users and cannot be deleted.
error.PERMISSION_NOT_FOUND: One or more informed permissions were not found.

forgetPasswordSent.title: Email sent
forgetPasswordSent.subtitle: If the address exists, we will send a reset link.
forgetPasswordSent.alert: Check your inbox and spam folder.

inviteResent.title: Email resent
inviteResent.subtitle: If the invitation is still available, we will send a new link.
inviteResent.alert: Check your inbox and spam folder.
